title: Science World Family Sundays
description: Interactive exhibits, live science shows, and hands-on activities for all ages. $5 admission after 5pm on Tuesdays.

title: Kitsilano Farmers Market
description: 50+ local vendors every Sunday. Live music, free samples, cooking demos, and a kids' activity area with face painting.

title: Stanley Park Spray Park
description: Vancouver's biggest spray park — completely free. Bring towels, sunscreen, and snacks. Open daily through Labour Day.

title: Granville Island Kids Market
description: Three floors of toy shops, indoor play area, ball pit, and craft stations. Take the Aquabus for $4 — kids love it.

title: Lynn Canyon Suspension Bridge & Pools
description: Free suspension bridge (skip the $65 Capilano!). Hiking trails, the 30 Foot Pool swimming hole, and the ecology centre.

title: PNE Fair 2026
description: Vancouver's summer fair. Rides, SuperDogs, nightly parade, mini donuts, concerts, and the prize home.

title: Kits Pool — Open for Summer
description: Canada's longest saltwater pool (137m). Heated, with ocean and mountain views. Open May to Labour Day.

title: Vancouver Aquarium
description: Sea otters, jellyfish, belugas, and the 4D theatre. Allow 2-3 hours. Buy tickets online to skip the line.

title: Grouse Mountain Summer Adventures
description: Skyride gondola, lumberjack shows, grizzly bear habitat, ziplines, and mountaintop playground.

title: Second Beach Pool & Playground
description: Heated outdoor pool on the beach with a massive playground next door. Perfect half-day combo.

title: Deep Cove Family Kayaking
description: Family kayak tours through Indian Arm. Rentals from $30/hour. Honey doughnuts at Honey's after.

title: Richmond Night Market
description: North America's largest night market. 600+ food stalls, carnival games, live entertainment. Fri-Sun evenings.

title: Free Library Storytime
description: Free drop-in storytime at every VPL branch. Songs, stories, rhymes, and craft activities. No registration.

title: Playland Amusement Park
description: Roller coasters, bumper cars, mini golf, and Kiddieland for littles. Buy tickets online for discounts.

title: Seawall Family Bike Ride
description: 10km flat loop around Stanley Park. Rent bikes at Denman Street (cheaper than inside the park). Budget 1.5 hours with kids.

title: Queen Elizabeth Park
description: 360° views from Vancouver's highest point. Sunken quarry garden, playground, pitch & putt, and the Bloedel Conservatory ($7).

title: VanDusen Festival of Lights
description: One million lights, carousel rides, marshmallow roasting, and Santa's workshop. A Vancouver holiday tradition.

title: Trout Lake Farmers Market
description: Saturday morning market with local produce, live music, and a huge playground right next to the market. Kids swim in the lake after.
